title: ASEOHA (All Seeing Eye Of Harmony Additions)
description: Adds legacy/deprecated features to NTM and even more!
body:
# ASEOHA (All Seeing Eye Of Harmony Additions)

### Expanding The New TARDIS Mod with new worlds, interiors, consoles, dimensions, and much more.

***

![Picture showing off ASEOHA blocks, items, and exteriors.](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1009/12/2024-11-06_00.png)

**Official Discord:** [https://discord.gg/AAxEnCHQQd](https://discord.gg/AAxEnCHQQd)

**ModDevCafe Discord:** [https://discord.com/channels/275448849693278220/1244661588112179342](https://discord.com/channels/275448849693278220/1244661588112179342)  
  

***

## What is ASEOHA?

ASEOHA is a large expansion addon for **The New TARDIS Mod**, bringing back legacy content, adding entirely new features, and expanding the Doctor Who experience far beyond the base mod.

What started as a project to restore content that never made the jump from older versions of NTM has grown into one of the largest addon projects for the mod, featuring new dimensions, TARDIS interiors, consoles, upgrades, structures, blocks, and gameplay mechanics.

Whether you're building the ultimate TARDIS, exploring distant worlds, or getting lost in endless corridors, ASEOHA adds more ways to experience life as a Time Lord.

***

## Features

### TARDIS Content

*   30+ unique TARDIS interiors
*   Legacy NTM interiors restored from older versions
*   Modular console systems
*   Additional ARS corridors and rooms
*   The Copper Console and Copper Interior
*   New flight upgrades and events
*   HADS (Hostile Action Displacement System)
*   Exterior shield hit animations
*   The Fourteenth Doctor's Sonic Screwdriver

### New Worlds

Travel to iconic locations from Doctor Who, including:

*   Gallifrey
*   Skaro
*   Midnight
*   Trenzalore
*   New Earth
*   Raxicoricofallapitorius
*   Clom

### New Earth & New New York

Explore an endlessly generating version of New New York, complete with sprawling city blocks that stretch far beyond the horizon.

### Characters & Creatures

*   K-9
*   Additional Doctor Who-themed content with more planned for future releases

### Building Content

*   Large collections of decorative blocks
*   Custom structures
*   TARDIS-themed building materials
*   Additional furniture and detail blocks
*   Plenty of tools for builders and interior designers

***

## Planned Features

Development is ongoing, with future updates planned to include:

*   Additional dimensions and planets
*   More interiors and corridors
*   New blocks and decorative content
*   More Doctor Who creatures and characters
*   Additional gameplay systems and upgrades

***

***

Join the Discord to suggest features, report bugs, share builds, or just hang out with the community.
